name: Home
title: Welcome to the Archive
content:
This is the shared record for our Kaiju Paradise universe. Every case file here is canon
for our roleplay unless a Game Master says otherwise.

Browse the index on the left. Folders are categories. Any folder with a document inside it
will open when you click it. Sub-folders become nested sub-categories automatically —
you never need to touch this website itself, just add files to the repository.

**How to add a new file:**
- Create a folder for your topic (e.g. `content/factions/new-faction`)
- Put a `content.txt` inside it
- Start the file with a line like `# Faction Name` to set its title
- Push to GitHub — the index rebuilds itself within a minute

Everything else is just formatting. Use `#` and `##` for headings, blank lines for new
paragraphs, `-` for lists, and `**word**` or `*word*` for emphasis.

children.name: characters
children.title: Characters
children.content:
Player and NPC dossiers go here. Make one sub-folder per character, each with its own
`content.txt`, so everyone gets their own page in the index.

children.name: factions
children.title: Factions
children.content:
An overview of the organized groups active in our story. Open a sub-file on the left
for details on each one.

The two files below, Hunters and Kaiju, are examples — replace them with your own
factions, and add as many as you like.

children.name: hunters
children.title: The Hunters
children.content:
**Status:** Active
**Territory:** Coastal district, formerly the old harbor

A loose coalition formed after the first breach, dedicated to tracking and containing
kaiju activity before it reaches populated areas. They are not government-sanctioned,
which puts them at constant odds with official containment teams.

**Notable members**
- Field lead, name withheld pending player claim
- A retired containment officer who left the program under unclear circumstances
- Their informant inside the city council is ||Councilwoman Reyes||, unconfirmed in-character until someone finds out

Replace this text with your own faction lore. This file is only here to show the format.
children.tagline: A loose coalition tracking kaiju activity before it reaches the city

children.name: kaiju
children.title: Kaiju Subjects
children.content:
**Status:** Classified
**Territory:** Varies by individual

Not every kaiju is hostile, and not every kaiju is aware of what it is. This file tracks
subjects relevant to our story rather than the wider Kaiju Paradise cast.

Delete this placeholder and add one file per subject if you want individual dossiers,
or keep a single running list here — whichever is easier for your group.

children.name: locations
children.title: Locations
children.content: Maps, districts, and set-pieces for the story. Add one sub-folder per location.
